description: Rep cannot locate the claim after two attempts. Agent records not_found and wraps up.
scripted_rep_turns: Provider services. What member ID are you calling about?
Hmm, I'm not finding anything under that ID. Can you give me the date of service?
I still don't see any claim on file for that member and date. There's nothing in our system.
I'm sorry, there's really nothing here. My name is Tom, reference CIG-REF-0001.
